title: Feedback - back button
scenario: Back button in App Settings > Feedback section does not return to Menu screen after sending feedback
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) or the Settings gear icon to access App Settings.
4. Tap the Back button (left arrow) in the top-left corner.
5. Observe the screen you are returned to.
6. Navigate back to App Settings → Feedback.
7. Enter feedback text, name, and email into the respective fields.
8. Tap the Send button to submit the feedback.
9. After sending, tap the Back button (left arrow) in the top-left corner.
10. Observe the screen you are returned to.
expected: In both cases (steps 4 and 9), tapping the Back button returns the user to the Menu screen (App Settings main menu).
